phone_presence_notes: Consistently warm and natural — used Josh's name organically, matched the customer's relaxed energy, and the rapport led directly to an on-call booking.
top_strength: Outstanding estimate on complex 2-day long-distance move — covered drive time rules, overnight logistics, hotel protocol, truck security.
coaching_note: No Worries, Meet Your Mover, and On-Time Guarantee all skipped — these are the differentiators that justify the price on comparison calls.
